# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Write secure code.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot_repository:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: "your-s3-bucket-name"
    region: "your-region"
    access_key: "your-access-key"
    secret_key: "your-secret-key"
    base_path: "elasticsearch-snapshots"
    compress: true

snapshot_policy:
  name: "daily-snapshot"
  schedule: "0 0 * * *"  # Daily at midnight
  repository: "snapshot_repository"
  indices: "*"
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: false

restoration:
  repository: "snapshot_repository"
  snapshot: "latest-snapshot"
  indices: "*"
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: false

security:
  xpack:
    security:
      enabled: true
      audit:
        enabled: true
      transport:
        ssl:
          enabled: true
          verification_mode: certificate
      http:
        ssl:
          enabled: true
          verification_mode: certificate
          keystore:
            path: "/path/to/keystore.jks"
            password: "your-keystore-password"
